SEARCH
Package io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi

Interface FormContributor

public interface FormContributor
SPI extension point: contributes additional fields and cross-constraints to a FormSpec after all individual elements have been processed.

Purpose

Some fields in a FormSpec don't correspond to any @FieldMeta element — they are synthetic, generated from the set of all processed fields.

Canonical example: in a FilterQL search form, combineWith, projection, and pagination are not bound to any single method of the DTO interface. They are derived from the full list of transformed filter fields and injected here.

Contract

  1. Called once per @FormSpec type, after all FieldTransformers have run.
  2. supports(FormContext) is evaluated first. If false, all other methods are skipped entirely.
  3. Multiple contributors may activate for the same form. Their contributions are appended in ServiceLoader order.

i18n — bundle entries

All human-readable texts in the JSON produced by additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and additionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) MUST use the standard DIFSP LocalizedString pattern: 
{ "default": "...", "i18nKey": "..." }
The corresponding bundle entries (key → default text) are contributed via bundleEntries(FormContext). The InputSpec processor merges these entries into the bundle skeleton it writes to META-INF/difsp/i18n/{formId}.properties.

Default implementation returns an empty map. Override when the contributor emits i18nKey references so that the generated bundle skeleton is complete.

Registration

Register via META-INF/services/io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContributor.

Example


 public class FilterQlFormContributor implements FormContributor {

     public boolean supports(FormContext ctx) {
         return !ctx.transformedFieldRefs().isEmpty();
     }

     public List<String> additionalFields(FormContext ctx) {
         return List.of(
             buildCombineWithJson(ctx),
             buildProjectionJson(ctx),
             buildPaginationJson(ctx)
         );
     }

     public List<String> additionalCrossConstraints(FormContext ctx) {
         return List.of(buildRefsExistConstraintJson(ctx));
     }

     public Map<String, String> bundleEntries(FormContext ctx) {
         String f = ctx.formId();
         return Map.of(
             f + ".fields.combineWith.displayName", "Logical combination",
             f + ".fields.projection.displayName",  "Fields to return",
             f + ".fields.pagination.displayName",  "Pagination"
             // ...
         );
     }
 }

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<String>
    additionalCrossConstraints(FormContext context)
    Returns additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings to append to the crossConstraints array of the FormSpec.
    List<String>
    additionalFields(FormContext context)
    Returns additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings to append to the fields array of the FormSpec, in the returned list order.
    default Map<String,String>
    bundleEntries(FormContext context)
    Returns the i18n bundle entries (key → default text) for all i18nKey references emitted by additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and additionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).
    boolean
    supports(FormContext context)
    Returns true if this contributor should activate for the given form.

  • Method Details

    • supports

      boolean supports(FormContext context)
      Returns true if this contributor should activate for the given form.

      Implementations typically inspect FormContext.transformedFieldRefs() to check whether their companion FieldTransformer processed any fields.

    • additionalFields

      List<String> additionalFields(FormContext context)
      Returns additional InputFieldSpec JSON strings to append to the fields array of the FormSpec, in the returned list order.

      Each string MUST be a valid DIFSP v2.1 §2.1 InputFieldSpec JSON object.

      All human-readable text MUST use { "default": "...", "i18nKey": "..." }. Never embed locale-keyed objects ("fr": "...", "en": "...").

      Returns:
      non-null, possibly empty list

    • additionalCrossConstraints

      List<String> additionalCrossConstraints(FormContext context)
      Returns additional CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON strings to append to the crossConstraints array of the FormSpec.

      Each string MUST be a valid DIFSP v2.1 §2.10 CrossConstraintDescriptor JSON object.

      All human-readable text MUST use { "default": "...", "i18nKey": "..." }.

      Returns:
      non-null, possibly empty list

    • bundleEntries

      default Map<String,String> bundleEntries(FormContext context)
      Returns the i18n bundle entries (key → default text) for all i18nKey references emitted by additionalFields(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext) and additionalCrossConstraints(io.github.cyfko.inputspec.spi.FormContext).

      The InputSpec processor merges these entries into the bundle skeleton (META-INF/difsp/i18n/{formId}.properties) so that every i18nKey in the generated FormSpec has a corresponding entry.

      Default implementation returns an empty map — override when the contributor emits i18nKey references.

      Returns:
      map of bundle key → default text; never null
